title: BEM-840 timestamp guard
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created=str(now)
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/AUTONOMY_CONTINUITY_CONTRACT_EXTENSION.md')
old=protocol.read_text(errors='ignore') if protocol.exists() else ''
block='''

## BEM-840 | Timestamp Source Guard
Дата: '''+created+'''
Все новые repo-отчёты, state-файлы, pending/handoff и Telegram-ориентированные сообщения должны брать время из executor переменной `now` в UTC+3. Ручные hard-coded timestamps в будущих задачах запрещены. Если агент не уверен в текущем времени, он обязан сначала проверить UTC+3 и не писать старую дату. Отчёт с неверным временем считается недостоверным и не может быть основанием для PASS.
'''
if '## BEM-840 | Timestamp Source Guard' not in old:
    protocol.write_text(old+block)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'timestamp_source_guard_installed','created_at':created,'rule':'use executor now UTC+3; hard-coded timestamps forbidden','blocker':None}
Path('governance/state/bem840_fix_timestamp_source_rule.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_fix_timestamp_source_rule.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Timestamp Source Guard | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: re-read BEM-839 with corrected timestamp discipline and continue triad repair. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Timestamp guard installed using executor now. Continue BEM-839 triad repair.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),'governance/state/bem840_fix_timestamp_source_rule.json','governance/reports/bem840_fix_timestamp_source_rule.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Installed timestamp source guard: future repo artifacts must use executor now UTC+3, not manual hard-coded dates')
"""
No issue comments.
